title: Date & Time Picker
description: Date & Time Picker allows users to select date and time through an intuitive input field and visual calendar. It supports disabled and readonly states and works with different calendar types, including gregorian and solar-hijri, offering a flexible and user-friendly selection experience.

sections.title: Calendar Type
sections.description: Demonstrates switching calendar system between 'gregorian' and 'solar-hijri'.

sections.title: States
sections.description: Demonstrates disabled, readonly, and validation states of the component.

sections.title: Constraints
sections.description: Demonstrates date range constraints, disabled dates, and holiday dates.

props.name: id
props.description: ID attribute for the component host. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Sets the component to readonly mode. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the input field.

props.name: value
props.description: Current value of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: Visual state of the component (e.g., error, success). Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Name attribute for the input element. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: dirty
props.description: Indicates whether the component value has been modified. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: isRequired
props.description: Indicates whether the component has required validation rules. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: depth
props.description: Depth of the calendar view. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: interface
props.description: Interface type for the component. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: activeView
props.description: Active view of the calendar. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.description: Number of calendar views to display. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.description: Minimum selectable date/time value. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.description: Maximum selectable date/time value. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.description: Dates to disable in the calendar. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: cellClass
props.description: Custom CSS class or resolver for calendar cells. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: cellTemplate
props.description: Deprecated. Use day/month/year cell templates on the calendar instead. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: dayCellTemplate
props.description: Template for rendering day cells. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: monthCellTemplate
props.description: Template for rendering month cells. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: yearCellTemplate
props.description: Template for rendering year cells. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: showNavigation
props.description: Show navigation controls in the calendar. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: type
props.description: Deprecated: use 'calendar' input instead. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: calendar
props.description: Calendar system to use for parsing/formatting (e.g., 'gregorian', 'solar-hijri').

props.name: picker
props.description: Picker mode controlling available parts.

props.name: format
props.description: Deprecated: prefer configuring locale profile formats. Used to override display format.

props.name: currentTimeButton
props.description: Shows a button to quickly set to the current time (configurable via AXDateTimePickerConfig).

props.name: weekend
props.description: Array of weekend day numbers (0-6, where 0 is Sunday). Used to determine which days are considered weekends for styling and behavior.

props.name: weekdays
props.description: Array of working day numbers (0-6, where 0 is Sunday). If not provided, uses the calendar system's default weekdays.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Focuses the component.
 *
 * Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.
 *
 * @returns void - Component receives focus.
 */
focus(): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 *
 * Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.
 *
 * @returns void - Component loses focus.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Commits a value with optional user interaction flag.
 *
 * Inherited from MXValueComponent.
 *
 * @param value - The value to commit.
 * @param u - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
commitValue(value: Date, u?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets the component value.
 *
 * Inherited from MXValueComponent.
 *
 * @param e - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
reset(e?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets validation errors.
 *
 * Inherited from MXValueComponent.
 *
 * @returns void - Validation errors are cleared.
 */
resetErrors(): void

/**
 * Validates the component.
 *
 * Inherited from MXValueComponent.
 *
 * @returns Promise<AXValidationSummary> - Validation result.
 */
validate(): Promise<AXValidationSummary>

/**
 * Adds a validation rule.
 *
 * Inherited from MXValueComponent.
 *
 * @param rule - The validation rule to add.
 */
addValidationRule(rule: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Removes a validation rule.
 *
 * Inherited from MXValueComponent.
 *
 * @param ruleToRemove - The validation rule to remove.
 */
removeValidationRule(ruleToRemove: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Renders the calendar view.
 *
 * Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.
 *
 * @returns void - Calendar view is rendered.
 */
render(): void
